result.diagram_code:
sequenceDiagram
participant Model
participant ProVerif
Model->>ProVerif: Load NeedhamSchroederPK_bug_02 model
ProVerif->>ProVerif: Parse process condition in the protocol code
ProVerif-->>Model: Syntax error at line 138, chars 15-17
ProVerif-->>Model: Verification does not proceed
result.explanation: This case does not reach protocol verification: ProVerif stops on a syntax error while parsing the model. The reported location is consistent with a boolean guard written with `||` in a process `if` condition, so the file is rejected before any secrecy or authentication query can be analyzed.
result.patch_suggestion: Rewrite the offending guard using ProVerif-accepted conditional structure, e.g. replace `if xA = A || xA = B then` with nested tests such as `if xA = A then ... else if xA = B then ...`. Apply the same style to similar `||` or `&&` guards elsewhere in the file.
result.notes: There is no attack trace here because the model does not parse. The exact offending token is most likely one of the `||` conditions; similar guards in the file may need the same fix.
